sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String);
UPDATE test_table SET value = multiIf(id = 1, 'updated1', id = 2, 'updated2', 'default') WHERE id <= 3;
SELECT id, transform(value, ['test1', 'test2'], ['changed1', 'changed2'], 'not_changed') AS new_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, multiIf(value = 'test1', 'One', value = 'test2', 'Two', 'Other') AS result FROM test_table;
